use_cases: Hero section showcasing rotating images with smooth fade transitions and optional text overlays
Product galleries with auto-play and keyboard arrow navigation for accessibility
Portfolio showcases with multiple directional slide options and image preloading
Testimonial or media galleries with smooth framer-motion animations
Landing page image carousels with 5-second auto-play intervals
ai_summary: A sophisticated image slider component featuring auto-play functionality, keyboard navigation support, and smooth framer-motion animations. Supports configurable direction (up/down), image preloading, and optional overlay content for displaying text or UI elements on top of rotating images. Built for modern landing pages and media showcases requiring accessible, animated image carousels.
